contactInfo.title: Contact Info
contactInfo.headsUpMessage: Although this information is optional, providing (accurate) information will help both enrich our interactions and lower your Risk % Standing giving you quicker and more convenient access to parts of the kingdom (such as not having to authenticate a payment token).
